workLog.entry: Fixed #2468 (P0): invoke_correction_applier.py and invoke_topical_memory_injection.py emitted invalid {"decision":"allow"} which Claude Code rejected, silently dropping advisories. Changed both to {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":...}}. Verified live (advisories now surface). Added stdout-JSON regression guards to both tests (54 pass). Regenerated copilot-cli shims. Bumped plugin.json .claude + copilot to 0.5.135. pre_pr all pass.
